\documentclass[letterpaper,10pt]{article}
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% BEGIN_FILE: mteck.sty
%% NOTE: Everything between here and END_FILE can
%% be relocated to "mteck.sty" and then included with:
%\usepackage{mteck}

% Dependencies
% NOTE: Some packages (lastpage, hyperref) require second build!
\usepackage[empty]{fullpage}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{fontawesome5}
\usepackage{multicol}
\usepackage{bookmark}
\usepackage{lastpage}
\usepackage{ragged2e}


% Sans-Serif
%\usepackage[sfdefault]{FiraSans}
%\usepackage[sfdefault]{roboto}
%\usepackage[sfdefault]{noto-sans}
%\usepackage[default]{sourcesanspro}

% Serif
\usepackage{CormorantGaramond}
\usepackage{charter}

% Colors
% Use with \color{Name}
% Can wrap entire heading with {\color{accent} [...] }
\usepackage{xcolor}
%\definecolor{accentTitle}{HTML}{0e6e55}
\definecolor{accentTitle}{HTML}{4682B4}
\definecolor{accentText}{HTML}{4682B4}
\definecolor{accentLine}{HTML}{a16f0b}

% Misc. Options
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyfoot{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\usepackage[margin=1.2in]{geometry}
\urlstyle{same}

% Adjust Margins
\addtolength{\oddsidemargin}{-0.75in}
\addtolength{\evensidemargin}{-1.1in}
\addtolength{\textwidth}{1.3in}
\addtolength{\topmargin}{-1.in}
\addtolength{\textheight}{1.7in}

\setlength{\multicolsep}{-3.0pt}
\setlength{\columnsep}{-1pt}
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{0pt}
\setlength{\footskip}{3.7pt}
\raggedbottom
\raggedright

% ATS Readability
\input{glyphtounicode}
\pdfgentounicode=1

%-----------------%
% Custom Commands %
%-----------------%

% Centered title along with subtitle between HR
% Usage: \documentTitle{Name}{Details}
\newcommand{\documentTitle}[2]{
  \begin{center}
    {\Huge\color{accentTitle} #1}
    \vspace{10pt}
    {\color{accentLine} \hrule}
    \vspace{2pt}
    %{\footnotesize\color{accentTitle} #2}
    \footnotesize{#2}
    \vspace{2pt}
    {\color{accentLine} \hrule}
  \end{center}
}

% Create a footer with correct padding
% Usage: \documentFooter{\thepage of X}
\newcommand{\documentFooter}[1]{
  \setlength{\footskip}{10.25pt}
  \fancyfoot[C]{\footnotesize #1}
}

% Simple wrapper to set up page numbering
% Usage: \numberedPages
% WARNING: Must run pdflatex twice!
\newcommand{\numberedPages}{
  \documentFooter{\thepage/\pageref{LastPage}}
}

% Section heading with horizontal rule
% Usage: \section{Title}
\titleformat{\section}{
  \vspace{-5pt}
  \color{accentText}
  \raggedright\large\bfseries
}{}{0em}{}[\color{accentLine}\titlerule]

% Section heading with separator and content on same line
% Usage: \tinysection{Title}
\newcommand{\tinysection}[1]{
  \phantomsection
  \addcontentsline{toc}{section}{#1}
  {\large{\bfseries\color{accentText}#1} {\color{accentLine} |}}
}

% Indented line with arguments left/right aligned in document
% Usage: \heading{Left}{Right}
\newcommand{\heading}[2]{
  \hspace{0pt}#1\hfill#2\\
}

% Adds \textbf to \heading
\newcommand{\headingBf}[2]{
  \heading{\textbf{#1}}{\textbf{#2}}
}

% Adds \textit to \heading
\newcommand{\headingIt}[2]{
  \heading{\textit{#1}}{\textit{#2}}
  \vspace{0.2em}
}
\newenvironment{resume_list}{
  \vspace{-7pt}
  \begin{itemize}[itemsep=-0.5pt, parsep=1pt, leftmargin=20pt]
}{
  \end{itemize}
}

% Formats an item to use as an itemized title
% Usage: \itemTitle{Title}
\newcommand{\itemTitle}[1]{
  \item[] \underline{#1}\vspace{4pt}
}

% Bullets used in itemized lists
%\renewcommand\labelitemi{--}

%% END_FILE: mteck.sty
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

\section{SUMMARY} 
% \tinysection{SUMMARY} 
% \begin{justify}
Over \textbf{5+ years}, I have transformed multiple business challenges into production-grade ML and AI solutions and delivered measurable business impact including \textbf{\$30M+ in cost savings} and improved model accuracy by 8-10\% across multiple projects. Hands-on experience in building and deploying production-grade ML and AI solutions for business use cases like report generation and Tableau Agent using modern frameworks like \textbf{LangGraph} and \textbf{ADK}. Published research in top-tier ML conference workshops including \textbf{NeurIPS} and \textbf{ICML}.
% \end{justify}

  %------------%
  % Experience %
  %------------%

\section{EXPERIENCES}
\headingBf{THE HOME DEPOT}{Jan 2024 -- Present}
\headingIt{Sr. Data Analyst | Delivery Analytics Team}{Atlanta, GA}
\begin{justify}
\begin{resume_list}


\item Developed and productionized an ML model (85\% accuracy) to detect on-time delivery failures; validated with A/B testing, resulting in an 8.5\% reduction in failures and retention of \$10M+ in customer spending annually.
\item Collaborated with data scientists and software engineers to develop a \textbf{SmartFulfill agent} using offline RL to optimize fulfillment decisions and reduce false alarms by 23\%.
\item Developed an automated report generation agent using LLM and LangGraph framework, streamlining weekly reporting processes and saving approximately \textbf{208 hours annually} (4 hours per week).

\item Built a Tableau agent using Google's ADK (Agent Development Kit) to enable leadership to make data-driven decisions independently, reducing ad-hoc requests and accelerating decision-making processes.

\item Leveraged LLM to pinpoint root causes of delivery failures and enhanced accuracy of previous root cause analysis by 9\% through thematic analysis of store associates' and drivers' comments.

\item Collaborated with Online Delivery Analytics team to devise an optimization model to pinpoint the optimal carrier for each vendor, maximizing discounts from primary carriers and \textbf{potentially yielding over \$30 million in savings}.

\item Developed a SQL workbook to calculate recommended pallet counts, validated results through an API endpoint, and constructed a \textbf{pallet compliance dashboard} for stakeholders, potentially generating \textbf{annual savings of \$2 million}.

\end{resume_list}
\end{justify}

\headingBf{VOLVO GROUP}{Jan 2023 -- Dec 2023}
\headingIt{Data Analyst | Logistics Purchasing Team}{Greensboro, NC}
\begin{justify}
\begin{resume_list}
\item Improved weekly inbound shipment predictions by 8\% in 3 months using SQL, time-series, and machine learning.
\item Engineered \textbf{10+ Power Automate flows, 5+ Power Apps, and 5+ Power BI dashboards} for process visualization, saving over 300 hours annually.
\item Constructed a Power Automate flow for invoice data analysis, identifying \$200K in savings on a \$1.8M invoices.
\end{resume_list}
\end{justify}

\headingBf{SYSTEMS ANALYTICS LAB, WEST VIRGINIA UNIVERSITY}{Aug 2021 -- Dec 2022}
\headingIt{Data Science Research Assistant}{Morgantown, WV}
\begin{justify}
\begin{resume_list}
\item Increased prediction accuracy by 10\% by analyzing tunnel heating issues using Python and time-series ML algorithms.
\item Developed a hybrid deep neural network for a track association in marine surveillance, achieving 85\% accuracy.
\item Performed data analysis on patient datasets and clustered similar patient groups using PCA and K-Means algorithms.
\end{resume_list}
\end{justify}
